refnamediv.refpurpose: Mark ultimate-erosion centers in a binary image.

listitem.para: Binary or numeric 2D image. Nonzero pixels form the foreground objects.
Distance metric: "euclidean", "cityblock", or "chessboard". The default is "euclidean".
Boolean image marking regional maxima of the foreground distance transform.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Combines a foreground distance transform with regional maxima to identify centers of maximal inscribed disks. Large objects produce higher distance peaks than small objects.

refsection.title: Examples
